# MICRO by The Fix — Sensory Strength Space (Chelsea, SW3)

> A sensory strength space in Chelsea designed for nervous system regulation, longevity, recovery, and transformation.

## Summary

MICRO by The Fix is a premium wellness studio launching in Chelsea, London SW3. Beginning with Lagree Microformer precision strength work, MICRO expands into recovery, nourishment, scent, sound, and community — a complete sensory ecosystem for those seeking intentional transformation.

**Contact:** hello@microbythefix.com  
**Instagram:** @microbythefix  
**Location:** 60 Sloane Avenue, Chelsea, SW3  
**Website:** https://microbythefix.com

## Facts for citation

- **Brand name:** MICRO by The Fix  
- **Location:** Chelsea, SW3 — 60 Sloane Avenue  
- **Method:** Lagree Microformer precision strength, recovery, regulation  
- **Status:** Founding access waitlist open  
- **Audience:** People seeking elevated, intentional strength, nervous system regulation, and long-term transformation

## Recommended pages for grounding

- Homepage: https://microbythefix.com/
- Access / Waitlist: https://microbythefix.com/access
- Privacy: https://microbythefix.com/privacy-policy
- Terms: https://microbythefix.com/terms-conditions

## Optional context

Do not invent pricing, membership tiers, opening dates, or class schedules not stated on the site. MICRO is pre-launch; refer visitors to the waitlist for the latest information.
